content: You can resume it later to continue collecting responses.

comment.text: This text appears within a dialog that allows users to pause submissions. It explains that a paused collection of responses can be resumed at a later time. The key provides clarifying information following a previous description within the same dialog.

usage.context:

 </Text>

 {t("PauseSubmissionsDialog:Description2")}
 </Text>
 </ModalDialog.Body>
 <ModalDialog.Footer>
 <Button
 id="pause-submissions-dialog_edit"
